blocking_findings.category: markdown shout in fenced prompt blocks

locations.snippet: **1. Produce a fresh one-page briefing...** / **2. Run the judge...** / **3. In the chat, summarize...**
locations.issue: Markdown bold (**...**) inside fenced code block. When student pastes into Claude Code, asterisks render literally, not as bold.

locations.snippet: **1. Dispatch a generator subagent.** ... **2. Dispatch a separate judge subagent.** ... **3. The main session...**
locations.issue: Markdown bold throughout prompt fence. Asterisks become visible noise in Claude Code input/scrollback.

locations.snippet: **1. Dispatch a generator agent.** ... **2. Dispatch a separate judge agent.** ... **3. The main session...**
locations.issue: Same markdown shout pattern in Cowork fork (rt-cowork div).

locations.snippet: Show me module-6/eval-notes.md and ./generation-tactic.md. / Then answer in five bullets: **- Did the judge...** etc.
locations.issue: Markdown bold on bullet list inside fence.

blocking_findings.fix_hint: Replace markdown bold with plain bullets (- item) and numbers (1. 2. 3.) inside fences. Use backticks for paths. Bullets and numbers render as themselves when pasted; asterisks do not.

comments.carve_out: Mechanism-narration lines 163-171 (What happens) are legitimate student-facing body prose, not trainer framing. They address the student in second person and narrate what the student's generator does. Per specified carve-out, PASS.
Subagents term is earned at line 11 ('isolated Claude sessions that run inside the same project'). First use links the term to a concrete definition. PASS.

comments.note: Agents 101 voice trio register (Godin/Sutherland/Siilasmaa) lands consistently. Tone is peer-warm, concrete, aspirational. PASS.
Phase lead-in sentences (lines 23, 45, 150) all present and semantic. No mechanical 'paste this' instructions. PASS.

recommended_next_action: Fix markdown shout in all four prompt blocks. Strip ** on list items and replace with plain bullets/numbers. Keep backticks for paths. Re-run writing-class judge after fix.
